subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath quaffed the sealed Wine from the hand of the bounty of His Name, the Self-Subsisting, that he may be drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن شرب الرحیق المختوم من ید عطاء اسمه القیوم لیجذبه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
